name: Gluten Free Bread Hints - Bread Machine
recipeIngredient: Xanthan gum (1 tablespoon per cup of flour, so 4 tablespoons)
Milk or water (as needed for consistency)
recipeInstructions:
1. Consult your bread machine's instruction manual to ensure it can bake whole grain breads.
2. Add the gluten-free flour blend, xanthan gum, yeast, sugar, and salt to the machine in this order.
3. Pour milk or water into the machine as directed by the manufacturer, ensuring the dough is well combined.
4. Select the appropriate setting for your desired loaf size (e.g., 1.5 pound square).
5. Begin the baking process according to the machine's instructions.
6. If using a yeast dispenser, do not activate it. Instead, sprinkle the yeast on top of the dry ingredients just before starting the machine.
7. For best results, use a combination of three or four flours in your gluten-free bread recipe.
8. Always check that your flours are stored in sealed containers to avoid contamination with gluten-containing products.
9. Consider using fortified soymilk as an alternative milk option for additional protein, calcium, vitamin D, and riboflavin content.
